trozei_v0.0.1-beta.description:
# Pokemon Trozei / Link

Pokemon Trozei as known in USA and Japan, and Pokemon Link in Europe is a match four game with multiple modes.
This archipelago has you play through the adventure mode going through the levels in a random order while defeating the generals of the Phobos Battalion on your way to finally defeat Baron Phobos.
This version only supports the European release Pokemon Link
Deathlink is present in the yaml but currenty not implemented
trozei_v0.0.1-beta.title: Pokemon Trozei - v0.0.1-beta

trozei_v0.0.2-beta.description:
# Changelog

## Added
 - Explicit universal tracker support
 - Deathlink
 - Opening a completed save does not check locked stages
## Fixed
 - Universal tracker no longer crashes
 - Reloading the rom is now properly possible
trozei_v0.0.2-beta.title: Pokemon Trozei - v0.0.2-beta
